Name: ESP32 WROOM 38-Pin Development Board
Purpose: Main microcontroller for self-driving path planning and web dashboard hosting

Name: MPU6050 3-Axis Gyroscope and Accelerometer
Purpose: IMU sensor to track relative yaw heading angle for straight line driving and pivot turns

Name: L298N 2A Based Motor Driver Module
Purpose: H-Bridge driver to control speed (PWM) and steering direction of the DC motors

Name: 4WD Smart Robot Car Chassis Kit
Purpose: Double-layer acrylic platform framework including 4 DC gear motors and 4 wheels

Name: DFPlayer Mini MP3 Player Module
Purpose: Hardware sound decoder to play voice responses/status warnings

Name: Stereo Enclosed Speaker 3W 8 Ohm (Pair)
Purpose: Compact enclosed speakers for vocal playbacks from the MP3 card

Name: HC-SR04 Ultrasonic Sonar Distance Sensor
Purpose: Ranging sensors for front left and right obstacle routing

Name: DC-DC LM2596 Buck Converter Step Down Module
Purpose: Steps down 11.1V battery voltage to a stable 5V line for the ESP32 and logic chips

Name: Orange 1000mAh 3S LiPo Battery Pack
Purpose: High discharge 11.1V rechargeable power supply pack for driving the vehicle motors

Name: Solderless Breadboard 830 Points
Purpose: Prototyping board to mount and interconnect the ESP32 and sensor pins

Name: 40pcs 10cm Male to Male Jumper Wire
Purpose: Signal routing cables to connect the components on the board
